---
title: "R版本更新"
date: "2026-5-5"
date-modified: today
categories: [config, R]
execute: 
  eval: false
---

## R版本更新

```{r}
# 在RGui中执行
installr::updateR()
```

![](images/update.png){fig-align="center" width="50%"}

### 安装RGui

![](images/information.png){fig-align="center" width="50%"}

![](images/install_new_R%20.png){fig-align="center" width="50%"}

### 迁移R包 

![](images/copy_R_packages_in_old_version.png){fig-align="center" width="50%"} ![](images/erase_R_packages_in_old_version.png){fig-align="center" width="50%"}

### Rprofile/Renviron

![](images/clipboard-593926832.png)

### Rstudio -\> Tools -\> Global Options -\>General

![](images/options.png){fig-align="center" width="75%"}

### Rconsole

```         
## Language for messages
language = 
```

↓

```         
## Language for messages
language = en
```

## Rstudio更新
